prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次依次为约 101→106→→113→49 名，2021–2024 年基本稳定在 101–113                                 名区间，2025 年大幅前移至 49 名，前移幅度约 64 名，为近五年最低位次。2025 年基准约 49 名；该校在吉林省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2022 年各 13                        人，2024 年 13 人，2025 年增至 15 人；2026 年计划 17 人，较 2025 年扩招 2 人（+13.3%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为                        985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第 2 名，属全国顶尖学府，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026                                                           年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、录取争议等事件；抖音热度排名第 3（高热），短视频曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续高涨；2025                                                      年声誉亦偏负面，但未出现明显投档断档记录。综合来看，高热度对竞争有正向推动作用，但负面舆情可能对部分考生心理产生轻微抑制；北京大学 A-                               及以上学科达 40 余个，涵盖数学 A+、物理学 A+、化学 A+、计算机科学与技术 A+、法学 A+、经济学 A+                                                                                      等，学科实力全国顶尖，与物理类招生专业（数学类、计算机类、电子信息类、物理学类等）高度匹配，对考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信                         、电气工程等专业近年在 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，社会热度高；本省 2026 年考生总数 110868 人，较 2025 年物理类 80421                                                     人明显增加，竞争基数扩大；北京大学位于北京，属全国性顶尖高校，吉林省考生跨省报考意愿强烈；本地无同层次高校分流，竞争集中。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合                            2025 年位次大幅前移至 49 名的强势走势、2026 年扩招 2 人（+13.3%）对竞争的缓解、抖音高热反映的报考关注度持续高涨、以及本省考生总数增加带来的竞争基数扩大，在                         2025 年基准 49 名基础上，扩招效应与竞争加剧相互对冲；预测最低位次约53名，区间30–80名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（元培）（数学类、物理学类、地球物理学类、计算机类、电子信息类）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学等方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息科学与技术、微电子科学与工程）
- 工科试验班类（理论与应用力学、工程力学、航空航天工程等）
- 物理学类（物理学、大气科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境科学（环境、健康、生态、地理与资源环境）
- 化学类（化学、应用化学、化学生物学）
- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 30–80 名内，建议以二档为主攻方向、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（30                                                              名以内）可重点冲刺元培试验班和计算机类等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（80 名附近）建议优先考虑二档专业并确保三档稳妥录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 101→106→→113→49, basically stable in the 101–113 range from 2021 to 2024, and significantly moved forward to 49 in 2025, a forward shift of about 64 places, the lowest ranking in the past five years. The 2025 baseline is about 49. The university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province for Science/Physics Category: 13 students each in 2021–2022, 13 in 2024, increased to 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 17 students, an increase of 2 students (+13.3%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, a top national institution that strongly attracts high-scoring students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety and admission controversies; it ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with massive short video exposure, reflecting continuously high application attention. In 2025, its reputation was also slightly negative, but no obvious admission gaps were recorded. Overall, high heat positively drives competition, but negative public opinion may slightly suppress some candidates' psychology. Peking University has over 40 A- or above disciplines, including Mathematics A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Law A+, Economics A+, etc., with top national disciplinary strength, highly matching the Physics Category admission majors (Mathematics, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Physics, etc.), strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is 110,868, significantly increased from 80,421 in the Physics Category in 2025, expanding the competition base. Peking University is located in Beijing, a top national university, and candidates from Jilin Province have a strong willingness to apply across provinces. There are no universities of the same level locally to divert competition, concentrating competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of the ranking significantly moving forward to 49 in 2025, the alleviation of competition from the 2026 enrollment expansion of 2 students (+13.3%), the continuously high application attention reflected by Douyin's high heat, and the expanded competition base due to the increase in the total number of candidates in this province, based on the 2025 baseline of 49, the expansion effect and intensified competition offset each other; the predicted lowest ranking is about 53, with a range of 30–80.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (Mathematics, Physics, Geophysics, Computer Science, Electronic Information)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Engineering Mechanics, Aerospace Engineering, etc.)
- Physics (Physics, Atmospheric Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Environmental Science (Environment, Health, Ecology, Geography and Resource Environment)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Chemical Biology)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 30–80, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 30), focus on sprinting for top majors like Yuanpei Experimental Class and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 80), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure safe admission with Tier 3.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 102→104→→103→29, stable in the 102–104 range from 2021 to 2024, then significantly advanced to 29th in 2025, an advance of about 74 places, the lowest ranking in five years. The 2025 baseline is about 29th place; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jilin Province: 22 students each in 2021–2022, 22 in 2024, 22 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, and the competitive situation is basically stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many consecutive years, a top national institution with extremely strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus safety, admission controversies, etc.; Douyin popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure; the 2025 reputation is also somewhat negative, but no obvious enrollment gaps were seen. High popularity drives application attention, with limited impact from negative public opinion; Peking University's A+ liberal arts disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature A+, Philosophy A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Archaeology A+, Chinese History A+, World History A+, Foreign Languages and Literatures A+, Political Science A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Applied Economics A+, etc., highly matching the history category admission majors (Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.), with top national disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are recommended/popular in 2024–2026, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 110,868, a significant increase from 31,071 in the history category in 2025, expanding the competition base; Peking University is located in Beijing, a top national university, with strong cross-province application willingness among Jilin liberal arts candidates; there are no local liberal arts universities of the same level to divert applicants, leading to highly concentrated competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the strong trend of the 2025 ranking advancing significantly from 103rd to 29th, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged at 22 students, the sustained high application attention reflected by Douyin's high popularity, and the expanded competition base due to the increase in the total number of candidates in the province, the unchanged plan and intensified competition offset each other based on the 2025 baseline of 29th; the predicted minimum ranking is about 26th, with a range of 12–57.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, Public Finance)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (Chinese Language and Literature, Archaeology, History, Philosophy, Sociology, Law, Journalism and Communication, Economics, Business Administration, Public Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese Language, Classical Philology, Applied Linguistics)
- Business Administration (Finance, Finance (Financial Economics), Accounting, Marketing)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Radio and Television, Advertising).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Philosophy (Philosophy, Religious Studies, Philosophy (Philosophy of Science and Technology and Logic Direction))
- Sociology (Sociology, Social Work)
- Archaeology
- Urban and Rural Planning
- English (only for English test takers).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 12–57, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 15th place), you can focus on sprinting for top majors such as Law, Economics, and Yuanpei Experimental Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 60th place), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure a safe admission in Tier 3.
